scenario: Self-employed single filer with Schedule C net profit ($75,000). Makes $13,758 SEP-IRA contribution. SE tax deduction ($5,303.58) and SEP deduction reduce AGI. QBI deduction applies (20% of qualified business income, limited to 20% of taxable income). No withholding — amount owed.
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case based on Self-Employment module (SEP-IRA deduction Schedule 1 Line 16, QBI deduction Form 8995); IRC §404(a)(8), §408(k), §199A; IRS Pub 560; SE tax per IRC §1401; QBI deduction per Rev. Proc. 2024-40
